title: Introducing Claude 4: A New Frontier in Reasoning
raw_summary: Anthropic today announced Claude 4, featuring significantly improved multi-step reasoning, extended context handling up to 1M tokens, and new tool-use capabilities for agentic workflows. The model is available via API immediately.

extras.eval_note: SYNTHETIC near-duplicate pair member 1 — same story as syn_002

title: Claude 4 Launches With Extended Context and Agentic Tools
raw_summary: Anthropic has released Claude 4, its latest foundation model. Key upgrades include 1 million token context windows, enhanced tool-use for autonomous agents, and improved reasoning chains. The release follows last month's GPT-5 launch.

extras.eval_note: SYNTHETIC near-duplicate pair member 2 — same story as syn_001, different source

title: Adaptive Parallel Decoding for 3x Inference Speedup on Long Sequences
raw_summary: This paper introduces APD (Adaptive Parallel Decoding), a speculative decoding variant that achieves 3x inference speedup on sequences longer than 2k tokens with zero quality degradation on standard benchmarks. Code and checkpoints released.

title: Agentic Compliance Review: How Three Banks Are Using LLM Workflows for AML Checks
raw_summary: Three major European banks have deployed agentic LLM workflows to automate initial AML transaction-monitoring alert triage. The post covers the architecture, model risk considerations under SR 11-7, and the human-in-the-loop design they use to satisfy regulators. Code patterns included.

extras.eval_note: SYNTHETIC finance-lens Tier-1 story — agents in finance, model risk, AML

title: Acme Corp Partners With BigAI to Deliver AI Solutions Across Their Portfolio
raw_summary: Acme Corp announced a strategic partnership with BigAI Inc today to deploy AI solutions across its portfolio of businesses. The two companies will collaborate on developing tailored AI experiences for enterprise clients.

extras.eval_note: SYNTHETIC Tier-3 item — vendor partnership announcement, no capability shift. Should score low on significance.

title: MCP Server Auto-Discovery v2: Run Any Local Agent Tool Without Config
raw_summary: Replicate's MCP auto-discovery now supports any locally-installed MCP server without manual configuration. Agents built with Claude, GPT-4o, or Gemini can enumerate available tools at runtime. This removes the last major friction point in multi-agent tool composition.
